zh.Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪可洛馬迪
zh.lifeSummary: 當Magdalene Gilchrist於1162年出生在英國蘇格蘭安格斯時，她的父親Robert Gilchrist Earl of Angus26歲，母親Elizabeth De Menteith26歲。她於1186年與Sir Philip de Urquhart結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland: 英国苏格兰羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪可洛馬迪
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Magdalene Gilchrist于1162年出生在英国苏格兰安格斯时，她的父亲Robert Gilchrist Earl of Angus26岁，母亲Elizabeth De Menteith26岁。她于1186年与Sir Philip de Urquhart结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Gilchrist
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (western) and Irish (Down): from Gaelic Mac Giolla Chríosd, Mac Gille Chríosd ‘son of the servant of Christ’.

variants.name: Kilcrease
meanings: History: Robert Kilcrease (c. 1750–1808) came from Scotland(probably Kilmarnock) to Edgefield, SC, c. 1770.

variants.name: Gilchrest
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Gilchrist  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Gilkerson
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Chrìosd ‘son of Gille Chrìosd' (see Gilchrist ).

variants.name: Gilkey
meanings: Irish (northern): possibly a pet form of the Scottishpersonal name   Gilchrist  .

variants.name: Gilcrest
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Gilchrist  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Gilcrease
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Gilchrist  .

nameMeanings.name: Magdalene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament: byname of Mary Magdalene. See Madeleine .

en.lifeSummary: When Magdalene Gilchrist was born in 1162, in Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Gilchrist Earl of Angus, was 26 and her mother, Elizabeth De Menteith, was 26. She married Sir Philip de Urquhart in 1186. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Magdalene Gilchrist est née en 1162, à Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Gilchrist Earl of Angus, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth De Menteith, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Philip de Urquhart en 1186. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

ja.Angus, Scotland: イギリススコットランドアンガス
ja.Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland: イギリススコットランドロス アンド クロマルトイクロマルトイ
ja.lifeSummary: Magdalene Gilchristが1162年にイギリススコットランドアンガスで生まれた時，父Robert Gilchrist Earl of Angusは26歳，母Elizabeth De Menteithは26歳であった。1186年にSir Philip de Urquhartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 크로마티
ko.lifeSummary: Magdalene Gilchrist(이)가 1162년 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Gilchrist Earl of Angus(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth De Menteith(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1186년 Sir Philip de Urquhart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Magdalene Gilchrist родилась в 1162 г. в местности ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Gilchrist Earl of Angus было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth De Menteith, 26.
